title: Zeruel Merging with Rei
wikitext:
[]: Zeruel Merging with Rei             Quote Post by Chroma » Sun Sep 30, 2012 10:34 am Maybe I'm missing something outwardly stated during the movie, but in 2.2, why did Zeruel gain the lower half of Rei after devouring Unit-0? The only thing I can think is that her soul and Zeruel's merged when she was "eaten", but that wouldn't make sense, IMO. Her soul is (probably) Lilith's, for one thing, and I doubt there'd be a reason for it to only manifest as Rei's lower body, or without Rei herself having some control of the thing. There's also the question of how this can even happen. I don't think it was ever shown to be possible in the original series, but it wasn't mentioned in Rebuild either.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Sep 30, 2012 2:53 pm Only reason it was never mentioned was because this was the first time an Angel ate an Eva Unit. No one knew this would happen because it shouldnt be possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Sep 30, 2012 3:28 pm Well Mari stated something like "It's even assimilating the Pilot", so I'd say that it's just Zeruel integrating characteristics of her and Zeruel into his own physical makeup, with no real involvement from her soul, just like it absorbed Zerogoki to fake it's idebntification signal. The resulting being does not act in any way that would suggest Rei being in any sort of control. In fact, it's possible that Zeruel got the information about what an identification signal even is from Rei's head. I like how this still stayed true to Zeruel's "personality", being one of the Angels that deliberately concerned itself with destroying humans instead of just blasting them away because they're in the way... It absorbed her for strategical advantages, but unlike Arael, Leliel or Armisael, didn't bother with comunication.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Sep 30, 2012 4:10 pm Kendrix wrote: I like how this still stayed true to Zeruel's "personality", being one of the Angels that deliberately concerned itself with destroying humans instead of just blasting them away because they're in the way... It absorbed her for strategical advantages, but unlike Arael, Leliel or Armisael, didn't bother with comunication.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sun Sep 30, 2012 4:41 pm Wouldn't Zeruel combining with Lilith's soul cause Third Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Sep 30, 2012 4:58 pm Clover wrote: Wouldn't Zeruel combining with Lilith's soul cause Third Impact?

[]: Re: Zeruel Merging with Rei             Quote Post by RobbieTGS » Sun Sep 30, 2012 5:58 pm Chroma wrote: Maybe I'm missing something outwardly stated during the movie, but in 2.2, why did Zeruel gain the lower half of Rei after devouring Unit-0? The only thing I can think is that her soul and Zeruel's merged when she was "eaten", but that wouldn't make sense, IMO. Her soul is (probably) Lilith's, for one thing, and I doubt there'd be a reason for it to only manifest as Rei's lower body, or without Rei herself having some control of the thing. There's also the question of how this can even happen. I don't think it was ever shown to be possible in the original series, but it wasn't mentioned in Rebuild either.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Sep 30, 2012 6:43 pm Na7e wrote: Outside of being a clone of Shinji's mom, Rei's origins in the rebuild are unknown at the moment outside of speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Sep 30, 2012 6:57 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: However, taking a good look at Lilith's body. She seems rather dead, or vegetable like. Obviously her soul is somewhere else, and if it's not in Lilith, and it's not in Rei, Where is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Sep 30, 2012 7:31 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Maybe in Rebuild the Spear of Longinus actually works to keep Lilith sedated. Just one more question to be answered.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Sun Sep 30, 2012 7:35 pm We're not supposed to multi-quote, right? Or am I thinking of a different forum? Anyway, I'll just @ all of my replies rather than use the quote feature, just in case. @Kendrix I also like how Zeurel kept his....antagonistic, human-destroying attitude even though it absorbed Rei. @Hyper Shinchan What unused mask scene? But yeah, I agree with the merge thing. @Username I thought the same, but we're not even sure if Rei actually has Lilith's soul this time. In any case, it may also have to do with physically touching Lilith's body, rather than just assimilating with only the soul. @RobbieTGS We know it's Rei's lower half because her breasts looked the same. Just kidding, hahaha. But seriously, I'm not sure - on one hand, you cold be right, and it could be more of an approximation of Zerogoki's body/soul. On the other hand, that body is just an Adam clone, and the soul is still hotly contested, though it's either partly Rei's, Lilith's, or even Mama Ritsuko's. In any case, you bring up a good point.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Oct 01, 2012 5:39 pm Clover wrote: Wouldn't Zeruel combining with Lilith's soul cause Third Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Oct 01, 2012 7:34 pm Though I'm not completely sure how it relates, I always assumed the reason corresponds with the EOE scene where Lilith also "eats" Rei and gains her physical characteristics.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Mon Oct 01, 2012 10:07 pm Warren Peace wrote: Though I'm not completely sure how it relates, I always assumed the reason corresponds with the EOE scene where Lilith also "eats" Rei and gains her physical characteristics.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Oct 01, 2012 10:45 pm Warren Peace wrote: Though I'm not completely sure how it relates, I always assumed the reason corresponds with the EOE scene where Lilith also "eats" Rei and gains her physical characteristics.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Oct 01, 2012 11:46 pm I think it's more like Rei's experiences were integrated into Lilith, since there's only one soul in this equation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 02, 2012 10:11 am Chroma wrote: We're not supposed to multi-quote, right? Or am I thinking of a different forum? Anyway, I'll just @ all of my replies rather than use the quote feature, just in case.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue Oct 02, 2012 12:20 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: I always thought Rei was the one who merged with Lilith willingly and gained Lilith's power/control over Lilith which is why Lilith takes on Rei's appearance.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 02, 2012 1:20 pm Warren Peace wrote: jaws

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Oct 02, 2012 3:25 pm Warren Peace wrote: There are a few ways you can look at it, but there is that blink-and-you-miss it shot of Lilith's chest forming jaws, giving the impression that she's consuming Rei. That's the main reason I think it must correspond to the Rebuild scene somehow.
